---
title: "Solution 2B — Microbiome baseline tidymodels workflow"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-tools: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(tidymodels)
  library(readr)
  library(dplyr)
})
```

```{r load-data}
set.seed(7)
source("_load_microbiome.R")
mic_full <- load_microbiome()
mic <- mic_full |> select(Label, all_of(mic_otu_cols(mic_full)))
```

```{r split}
split <- initial_split(mic, prop = 0.75, strata = Label)
train <- training(split)
test <- testing(split)
```

```{r workflow}
rec <- recipe(Label ~ ., data = train) |>
  step_mutate(across(all_numeric_predictors(), ~ log1p(.x))) |>
  step_zv(all_predictors()) |>
  step_normalize(all_numeric_predictors())

spec <- decision_tree(tree_depth = 4, min_n = 10) |>
  set_engine("rpart") |>
  set_mode("classification")

wf <- workflow() |> add_recipe(rec) |> add_model(spec)
metrics_cls <- metric_set(accuracy, roc_auc, sens, yardstick::spec)

set.seed(7)
fit_res <- last_fit(wf, split, metrics = metrics_cls)
collect_metrics(fit_res)
```

```{r majority}
majority <- names(which.max(table(train$Label)))
mean(test$Label == majority)
```

```{r session, echo=FALSE}
sessionInfo()
```
